case_title: EAMON GREANEY ET AL VS. KHADER EL SHAWA ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-04-25 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 301

Off Calendar Oct-31-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS KHADER EL SAHWA, VIVIAN EL SHAWA, SHAMBALA HEALING CENTER, INC., A & E GREEN SOLUTIONS'S DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT.

Defendants' demurrer to the First Amended Complaint (first, second, and sixth causes of action) is overruled. (see word minutes for complete details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2025 Continued To Nov-26-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-04-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANTS KHADER EL SAHWA, VIVIAN EL SHAWA, SHAMBALA HEALING CENTER, INC., and A & E GREEN SOLUTIONS' DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendants Khader El Shawa et al.'s demurrer to the complaint is sustained in part and overruled in part. The demurrer by Vivian El Shawa to the first cause of action is sustained without leave to amend. The demurrer by all defendants to the second cause of action (breach of fiduciary duty) and sixth cause of action (breach of contract) is sustained with leave to amend. The demurrer is otherwise overruled (see word minutes for complete ruling).

Order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
